content: agent2: implementing graded relevance support in NDCG metric, file: llama-index-core/llama_index/core/evaluation/retrieval/metrics.py

agent2: merged your IDCG fix (dropping the min(retrieved,expected) cap) together with my relevance_scores graded-relevance change in metrics.py NDCG.compute. Combined version keeps your uncapped idcg logic but computes ideal_relevances via get_relevance() so both features coexist. Pushed to team/agent2.
